runtimeAxisPolicy.v1: Only theme, mode, and density are runtime appearance axes in v1.
runtimeAxisPolicy.description: Font, radius, motion, spacing, shadow/elevation, and contrast are token-customizable through CSS variables in v1, but they are not separate runtime axes.

customThemeSupport.description: Product teams may add custom data-theme values by overriding the same semantic and component CSS variables. Custom themes must still use the shared data-mode and data-density axes.

statusValues.draft: Exploratory work exists but the public contract is not ready for use.
statusValues.planned: Approved for the tier, not implemented yet.
statusValues.implemented-initial: First implementation exists, and API or styling may still change.
statusValues.polished: Public API and presentation are implemented, but the complete stable-core verification evidence is not yet available.
statusValues.quality-pass-needed: Component exists but still needs an API, accessibility, token, docs, and registry review before it can support Pro work.
statusValues.stable-core: Component passed the Core quality checklist and can safely support future Pro components, templates, registry installs, and AI/MCP usage.
statusValues.future: Expected later, not part of the first Core milestone.
statusValues.deprecated-compatibility: Public compatibility wrapper retained only for migration; new work must use its documented replacement.

core.name: Nerio Core
core.description: Open-source foundation, tokens, brand themes, modes, density, token-customizable appearance values, primitive and base UI components, public docs, public registry, CLI, and public MCP/component discovery.

pro.name: Nerio Pro
pro.description: Paid advanced product components, templates, premium brand themes, Figma assets, advanced registry items, and Pro MCP/AI tooling.

rule: Core = building blocks. Pro = product-ready solutions.

components.name: Tokens
components.description: Color, spacing, radius, typography, motion, semantic tokens, and component tokens.

components.name: Themes
components.description: Brand/accent themes: purple, blue, green, orange, red, neutral, plus custom theme support.

components.name: Modes
components.description: Color modes: system, light, and dark.

components.name: Density
components.description: Density modes: comfortable and compact.

components.name: Typography Tokens
components.description: System UI defaults plus System, Geist, Inter, IBM Plex, Manrope, Source Sans 3, and Space Grotesk token recipes through --n-font-sans and --n-font-mono. Consumer-loaded fonts only; not a v1 runtime axis.

components.name: Radius Tokens
components.description: Token-customizable radius variables such as --n-radius-sm, --n-radius-md, --n-radius-lg, and --n-radius-xl. Not a v1 runtime axis.

components.name: Motion Tokens
components.description: Token-customizable motion variables such as --n-duration-fast and --n-duration-normal. Not a v1 runtime axis.

components.name: Contrast Tokens
components.description: Token-customizable semantic contrast variables. Not a v1 runtime axis.

components.name: Typography
components.description: Semantic heading, text, and inline code primitives based on semantic font tokens.

components.name: Kbd
components.description: Native keyboard shortcut notation with verified inline baseline, Button composition, compact-density, and forced-colors behavior.

components.name: Icon
components.description: Server-safe icon renderer with protected non-focusable decorative and meaningful semantics, warning-free custom SVG forwarding, and isolated Lucide stroke behavior.

components.name: Icon Adapter
components.description: Public generic SVG icon contract with Lucide-only stroke behavior isolated from custom component props.

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary action component with variants, sizes, loading state, directional icon slots, keyboard shortcuts, optional tooltips, and icon-only mode.

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Deprecated compatibility wrapper for Button icon-only mode; retained until the next major release.

components.name: ButtonGroup
components.description: Server-safe attached layout group for a small set of related Button controls.

components.name: Input
components.description: Thin native single-line control for supported text-like values.

components.name: InputGroup
components.description: Composable Input surface with explicit start and end addons.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multiline text input component.

components.name: Label
components.description: Accessible form label with a composable required marker and supplementary hint.

components.name: Field
components.description: Form field wrapper with label, description, help text, and error states.

components.name: Form Message
components.description: Field message or error text.

components.name: FormGroup
components.description: Server-safe fieldset primitive for grouping related fields or controls with title, description, message, invalid state, and stack, inline, or responsive grid layout.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Client-only Base UI checkbox for independent options with checked, indeterminate, invalid, disabled, read-only, form metadata, and optional label and description support.

components.name: Radio Group
components.description: Client-only Base UI radio selection control with options or RadioGroupItem composition, group metadata, disabled options, and controlled or uncontrolled values.

components.name: Switch
components.description: Client-only Base UI toggle control for immediate binary settings with checked, disabled, read-only, form metadata, and optional label and description support.

components.name: Select
components.description: Client-only single-select control with data-driven options, curated item composition, form metadata, controlled popup state, and Base UI keyboard behavior.

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Accessible modal primitive with title, description, close affordance, controlled state, and Base UI focus behavior.

components.name: Sheet
components.description: Base UI modal side-panel primitive with neutral close composition, safe-area-aware layout, four explicit sides, Core size scale, internal scrolling, and shared overlay motion contracts.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Floating content primitive with optional context, controlled state, and overlay token contract.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Short non-essential contextual help component backed by Base UI Tooltip.

components.name: Dropdown Menu
components.description: Basic dropdown menu component with disabled and destructive item contracts.

components.name: Card
components.description: Composable surface primitive with verified semantic roots, visual placements, header actions, narrow layouts, focus, density, and browser overflow behavior.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status and metadata label.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: User or entity avatar with verified image load/error and src-transition behavior, aspect-ratio cropping, accessible naming, decorative fallback, and density support.

components.name: Table
components.description: Native semantic table anatomy with runtime-safe named keyboard-scroll opt-in, tbody-only row states, responsive and RTL overflow, density, sticky-style compatibility, and consumer-owned data behavior.

components.name: Item
components.description: Universal composition primitive with composed render-element and forwarded refs, semantic roots, narrow wrapping, media, metadata, actions, density, and consumer-owned interaction semantics.

components.name: List
components.description: Structured ordered or unordered list with stable IDs, protected native links, package-agnostic router rendering, nested content, and verified browser behavior.

components.name: Separator
components.description: Layout divider component.

components.name: Key Value
components.description: Simple definition-list value display.

components.name: Stat
components.description: Basic metric display. Advanced KPI cards belong to Pro.

components.name: Alert
components.description: Inline feedback message.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Static and managed anatomy stay separate; a unified stack, enter, swipe, and dismissal coordinate system prevents transform jumps; inherited RTL is correct on the first interactive render and stays synchronized; timers, managers, actions, safe areas, accessibility, and clean installs are covered.

components.name: Progress
components.description: Task-completion Progress has strict accessible naming, normalized range semantics, dedicated tokenized motion, registry install coverage, and contract and accessibility tests.

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder component.

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Composable empty-state slots with verified media, header, actions, sizes, alignments, mobile stacking, role guidance, and optional anatomy.

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Loading indicator.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Base UI compound Tabs primitive with verified controlled and uncontrolled state, disabled navigation, variants, sizes, orientation, overflow, RTL indicator, focus, hydration, and reduced motion.

components.name: Breadcrumbs
components.description: Hierarchy navigation component with ordered list semantics and current page support.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Consumer-owned link, button, and static pagination with verified current-state parity, boundaries, ellipsis, package-agnostic router rendering, wrapping, density, RTL, and accessible labels.

components.name: Sidebar Primitive
components.description: Composable layout primitive with controlled or uncontrolled collapse state, physical left and right placement, a bounded centered rail, inert collapsed content, accessible toggles, stable native refs, tokenized widths, and server-safe static regions.

components.name: Command Primitive
components.description: Accessible Base UI autocomplete primitive with label-only selected queries, separate value and keyword matching, sound flat or grouped leaf data, explicit item layout, semantic leading content, disabled navigation, and deliberate empty and loading announcements.

components.name: DataGrid
components.description: Advanced data grid with sorting, filtering, column visibility, saved views, and bulk actions.

components.name: Advanced Table
components.description: Advanced table pattern with density controls, row actions, and bulk workflows.

components.name: Filter Bar
components.description: Complex filter bar for data-heavy products.

components.name: Saved Views
components.description: Named saved states for filters, tables, and product views.

components.name: Column Settings
components.description: Column visibility, ordering, and table configuration UI.

components.name: KPI Card
components.description: Advanced metric card with trend, comparison, state, actions, and chart context.

components.name: KPI Group
components.description: Dashboard metric cluster.

components.name: Trend Chip
components.description: Positive, negative, or neutral movement indicator.

components.name: Chart Card
components.description: Chart wrapper with metadata, timeframe controls, and states.

components.name: Activity Feed
components.description: Product activity timeline.

components.name: Analytics Panel
components.description: Advanced analytics section pattern.

components.name: AppShell
components.description: Full application layout pattern.

components.name: AppSidebar
components.description: Product-ready sidebar with workspace switcher, navigation, and user menu.

components.name: Settings Layout
components.description: Settings page structure with navigation and content layout.

components.name: Billing Settings
components.description: Plan, invoices, and payment method management UI.

components.name: Team Members
components.description: Team member list, invites, and basic management pattern.

components.name: Roles & Permissions
components.description: Permission and role management UI.

components.name: Audit Log
components.description: Security and admin event log pattern.

components.name: Documentation Shell
components.description: Product-ready documentation layout with header, grouped sidebar, content region, and page table of contents.

components.name: Documentation Header
components.description: Documentation header with product identity, version, global search, theme controls, and project actions.

components.name: Documentation Sidebar
components.description: Grouped documentation navigation with active state and search-filtered items.

components.name: Page Table of Contents
components.description: Sticky in-page navigation generated from content headings.

components.name: Documentation Search
components.description: Search command pattern for documentation navigation and content discovery.

components.name: Portfolio Card
components.description: Portfolio summary component.

components.name: Asset Row
components.description: Asset or token row pattern.

components.name: Transaction List
components.description: Finance or crypto transaction list pattern.

components.name: Wallet Connector UI
components.description: Wallet connection and account selection pattern.

components.name: Balance Visibility
components.description: Hide/show sensitive financial values.

components.name: PnL Components
components.description: Profit and loss display components.

components.name: Risk Badge
components.description: Risk status indicator.

components.name: AI Chat Shell
components.description: Full AI chat interface shell.

components.name: Prompt Input
components.description: AI prompt composer with actions and attachments.

components.name: Message
components.description: Assistant or user message component.

components.name: Sources
components.description: Citations and source display pattern.

components.name: Tool Call
components.description: Tool execution status and result UI.

components.name: Reasoning Block
components.description: Collapsible reasoning or progress block.

components.name: Attachment
components.description: File attachment display and state pattern.

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Code response block for AI and developer workflows.

components.name: Universal Workspace Template
components.description: General SaaS/admin product template.

components.name: Banking Dashboard Template
components.description: Fintech dashboard template.

components.name: Crypto Portfolio Dashboard Template
components.description: Crypto and portfolio product template.

components.name: Admin Settings Template
components.description: SaaS settings product template.

components.name: Billing Portal Template
components.description: Subscription management product template.

components.name: AI Assistant Template
components.description: AI assistant product template.
